title: 🧪 test: add coverage for scoreProjection
description:
🎯 **What:** The `scoreProjection` function in `@voice/speaking-metrics` was previously completely untested.

📊 **Coverage:** Added comprehensive test coverage prioritizing the specific mathematical boundaries and quirks of the actual implementation. This includes testing boundary values (e.g. > -10 vs > -18), variance bonuses (including the max cap of 10), negative variances, maximum score clamping to 100, and defensive cases (NaN, Infinity).

✨ **Result:** Test coverage for `packages/speaking-metrics/src/index.ts` has been increased, specifically securing the `scoreProjection` behavior against unintended changes.

*(Note: The 'Current Code' snippet in the prompt was outdated and did not match the actual code on main. Tests were written for the actual implementation currently in the file).*
commit_message: test: add tests for scoreProjection in speaking-metrics
